---
title: "The oppositional affordances of data activism"
author: "Milioni, D., and Papa, V."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Media International Australia, 183(1), 1–16. doi: 10.1177/1329878X221074795"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
